## CSS Loader for Millennium v1.2.3

This release adds mode-aware DeckThemes catalog scopes so Desktop and Big
Picture themes stay in their intended Steam interface.

### Mode-aware catalog targeting

- Fixes Desktop Store themes such as Prominent Store Prices affecting Big
  Picture Store pages.
- Caches DeckThemes catalog targets when a theme is installed.
- Backfills catalog metadata for existing themes that include a DeckThemes
  UUID.
- Publishes each runtime injection with a `desktop`, `gamepad`, or `all` scope.
- Preserves stock CSS Loader behavior when catalog metadata is unavailable.
- Supports an optional `.css-loader-scope.json` override for local and
  manually installed themes.
- Keeps local catalog metadata out of uploaded theme ZIPs.
- Adds regression tests for catalog classification, caching, overrides,
  backfill, and runtime serialization.

Install CSS Loader Companion v1.2.2 separately to enforce these scopes across
Steam's direct documents and isolated Store BrowserViews. Existing themes,
profiles, settings, and the selected Millennium theme remain unchanged.
